assertionResults.fullName: PM-Core V2 WorkGraph architecture exposes WorkGraph public types from contracts and core without exposing storage
assertionResults.title: exposes WorkGraph public types from contracts and core without exposing storage

assertionResults.fullName: PM-Core V2 WorkGraph architecture keeps recursive task hierarchy SQL inside core-owned storage/traversal modules
assertionResults.title: keeps recursive task hierarchy SQL inside core-owned storage/traversal modules

assertionResults.fullName: PM-Core V2 WorkGraph architecture forbids legacy task_relations.groups from being used as a hierarchy traversal source
assertionResults.title: forbids legacy task_relations.groups from being used as a hierarchy traversal source

assertionResults.fullName: PM-Core V2 WorkGraph architecture ignores legacy groups fixtures while still catching production traversal shortcuts
assertionResults.title: ignores legacy groups fixtures while still catching production traversal shortcuts

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphContainmentQueryService loads ancestor chains for multiple roots with one parent_id-only recursive query
assertionResults.title: loads ancestor chains for multiple roots with one parent_id-only recursive query

assertionResults.fullName: SqliteWorkGraphContainmentQueryService loads direct children for multiple parents with one parent_id batch query
assertionResults.title: loads direct children for multiple parents with one parent_id batch query

assertionResults.title: accepts the canonical saga -> epic -> task -> subtask hierarchy shape

assertionResults.title: rejects saga parent_id so Saga membership stays relation-backed

assertionResults.title: rejects epic parents, task-under-task, and child-under-subtask matrix breaches

assertionResults.title: rejects moves that would create a parent_id containment cycle
